title: populus kangdingensis var. tibetica
intro: Populus kangdingensis var. tibetica, also known as the Tibet poplar, is a deciduous tree species native to the high-altitude mountainous regions of the Tibetan Plateau. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains salicin and other compounds with anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Tibet poplar include reducing fever, relieving pain, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. Tibet poplar is often used in traditional Chinese medicine, prepared as an infusion or tincture, and also used to make herbal teas and infusions for its medicinal properties.
